notes: v0.16.37 — STRAFE / SLIPSTREAM render + cleanup fix. STRAFE was showing a black screen because the view was drawing at world coords outside the camera. Both modes now use a dedicated CanvasLayer so they fill the viewport in screen space. Fixed: side-scroll panel persisting onto the RIFTS menu after ESC or 3-hit loss (ship-flying-right strip under the difficulty cards, game bg in HUD) — CanvasLayer wrappers now get freed when the match tears down. Player ship in STRAFE + SLIPSTREAM now uses your active CLASS shape + color (SHARD triangle / BASTION hex / LANCE rhombus / CHORUS rings) instead of the generic cyan triangle. Windows only.
